title: Wild Fermented Indian Mushrooms Dum
description: A fermented and crisp take on traditional Indian dum, featuring wild mushrooms and a keto-friendly twist. This dish is perfect for adventurous eaters who want to try something new and exciting.
instructions: Start by heating 2 tbsp of ghee in a pan over medium heat.
Add the cumin seeds and mustard seeds and let them sizzle for 1 minute.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger and sauté until the onion is lightly browned.
Add the cumin, mustard, chili powder, and garam masala and stir for 1 minute.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the fermented greens and salt and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a bowl and set aside to cool.
Add the fresh cilantro to the bowl and mix to combine.
To assemble the dum, place a spoonful of the mushroom mixture onto a small piece of dough and fold the dough to form a half-moon shape.
Place the dum onto a steamer basket and steam for 10 minutes.
Serve the dum hot with a dollop of raita or a side of cucumber salad.
